# Demo / Test Logins

All accounts share ONE password (not stored in this file). To (re)create or fix these accounts:

```sh
DEMO_PASSWORD='...' php scripts/seed_demo_users.php          # seed / reset
DEMO_PASSWORD='...' php scripts/seed_demo_users.php --verify # smoke-test logins
```

Log in at `/login` with the email + the shared password. Password: _set via `DEMO_PASSWORD` at seed time — see seeder output_

| Role | Email | Scope |
|---|---|---|
| admin | `test-admin@mekaneselamss.com` | Everything (`/admin/`) |
| teacher | `test-teacher@mekaneselamss.com` | Own classes (`/teacher/`) |
| student | `test-student@mekaneselamss.com` | Own record (`/student/`) |
| parent | `test-parent@mekaneselamss.com` | Linked children (`/parent/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-limat@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Development only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-guzo@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Pilgrimage & Travel only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-bego-adragot@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Charity only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-timhirt@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Education & Curriculum only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-mezmur@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Choir & Hymns only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-outreach@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Charitable Outreach only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-kinetbeb@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Fine Arts only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-av@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Audio & Visual only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-board@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Board of Admins only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-secretariat@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Secretariat only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-construction@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Construction Committee only (`/staff/`) |
| staff (dept head) | `head-parents@mekaneselamss.com` | Department: Parents' Committee only (`/staff/`) |

Seeding is idempotent and non-destructive: it only creates/resets the accounts
above (plus their minimal linked records). It does NOT wipe data. For fully wired
sample data (classes, grades, attendance, payments) use Admin → System → Reset / Data.
